title: Stale temporary bytes can corrupt the next workspace-store write
observed: The reused temporary path is opened without truncation before replacement.
expected_boundary: Every atomic replacement starts with an empty temporary file.
failure_mechanism: A shorter write leaves trailing bytes from an interrupted longer temp file.
break_it_angle: Leave a longer stale temp and persist a shorter document.
impact: A malformed temp can replace the last valid canonical workspace store.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Truncate the document temp file before writing.
mitigation.behavior_test: Persist shorter JSON over a longer stale temp and parse exact bytes.

implementation_assessment.rationale: One file-open mode and a focused deterministic test.

confidence_calibration.confidence_ceiling_applied: Confirmed for missing truncation; runtime crash manifestation unobserved
confidence_calibration.rationale: The unsafe file-open property is deterministic in source.

skill_escalation.reason: The trigger is an interrupted write and recovery path.

title: Credential metadata and secure values can partially commit
observed: Secure storage mutates before the independent workspace metadata write.
expected_boundary: Cross-store mutation remains fail-closed and restart-recoverable without raw-secret journaling.
failure_mechanism: There is no durable non-secret intent or cleanup record between the stores.
break_it_angle: Fail or terminate after secure mutation and before metadata replacement.
impact: Pinned sessions can lose credentials or secure values can become orphaned.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Persist expected metadata and pending deletions before secure mutation, then finalize.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Drain pending secret deletions at startup.
mitigation.behavior_test: Inject halfway failures and assert fail-closed metadata plus restart cleanup.

implementation_assessment.rationale: The repair crosses the JSON store, secure abstraction, and startup lifecycle.

confidence_calibration.rationale: The split writes and absent compensation are directly visible.

title: Incomplete credential profiles are promoted as configured
observed: Creation hard-codes configured and workspace validation checks only profile ID presence.
expected_boundary: Readiness derives from required declared fields and actual secure presence.
failure_mechanism: Metadata existence is promoted to credential authority.
break_it_angle: Create and bind a required-secret profile with no secret.
impact: The UI reports readiness and session creation fails only during provider activation.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Refresh actual fields/status and warn/block before session preparation.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Fail profile resolution when required fields are missing.
mitigation.behavior_test: Missing required secret is never reported configured.

implementation_assessment.rationale: Two backend modules and focused status/validation tests.

confidence_calibration.rationale: The wrong status assignment is deterministic.

skill_escalation.reason: The bad derived status misleads the operator.

title: Foreign-platform paths are treated as session-ready
observed: Non-native paths skip reachability checks and can reach native directory creation.
expected_boundary: Foreign syntax may persist but cannot authorize native I/O.
failure_mechanism: Syntax normalization is conflated with platform availability.
break_it_angle: Create a Windows output path on Unix.
impact: Late session failure or a wrongly named local directory.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Issue unavailable errors/warnings and reject non-native create.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Keep cross-platform normalization for display/round-trip only.
mitigation.behavior_test: Foreign primary blocks and foreign output creates nothing.

implementation_assessment.rationale: Validation and one I/O boundary require platform-conditional tests.

confidence_calibration.rationale: On Unix, Windows syntax deterministically skips the check and is not an absolute native PathBuf.

title: Store validation permits duplicate canonical identities
observed: The persistence reader does not enforce workspace/profile ID or name uniqueness.
expected_boundary: The source-of-truth reader rejects semantic identity ambiguity.
failure_mechanism: Writer-only checks are treated as persistent constraints.
break_it_angle: Duplicate an ID while retaining valid active/default references.
impact: Reads and edits can select a different record than the operator intended.

mitigation.minimal_repair: Reject duplicate IDs/names and unsupported schema versions.
mitigation.local_guardrail: Preserve malformed bytes in a private corruption backup.
mitigation.behavior_test: Ambiguous store is quarantined and never loaded as authority.

implementation_assessment.rationale: A local validator and recovery test cover the source-of-truth seam.

confidence_calibration.rationale: The absent constraints are a static schema/reader property.

skill_escalation.reason: Semantic corruption otherwise prevents deterministic startup behavior.
